requirementsSummary:

Tenant Improvements Sheet' to customer user, so all three customer, developer, O2O and Agent will all get updated on real time basis of their activities. You can rename Lead Registration & Tracking to 'Manage Transactions'. under which Register New Lead will be the first step, which will be available to Customer, O2O, and Agent.
